ddls:
CREATE TABLE "software_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each software version */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Version identifier (e.g., None, Old version, stable) */,
  "version_type" TEXT /* Type of version (e.g., test, beta, stable, bug fix) */,
  "code_name" TEXT /* Code name associated with the version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "kernel_version" TEXT /* Kernel version associated with the software version */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comments or notes regarding the version */,
  "support_status" TEXT /* Support status (e.g., supported, deprecated, end-of-life) */,
  "release_manager" TEXT /* Manager responsible for the release */,
  "development_team" TEXT /* Team responsible for the development of the version */,
  "qa_team" TEXT /* Team responsible for quality assurance */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Detailed changelog for the version */,
  "release_notes_url" TEXT /* URL to the detailed release notes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the version type (e.g., test, beta, stable) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the version type is currently active or deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "kernel_versions" (
  "kernel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each kernel version entry */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the software version it is associated with */,
  "kernel_version" TEXT /* Kernel version number */,
  "release_info" TEXT /* Additional information regarding the kernel version */,
  "is_stable" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the kernel version is considered stable */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the kernel version was released */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("kernel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_kernel_versions_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES software_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "release_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the software version it relates to */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment or note */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the comment */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_release_comments_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES software_versions ("version_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each software version
